title: エンディング（ノーマル）

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My first three years with Sakura Chiyono O have
come to a close.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has managed to leave quite a mark on the
Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Great job, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hehe, we sure made a lot of memories, huh?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Like when I gave you my notebook, and when I
ran the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Or when I finally found rivals of my own... and
when new rivals found me.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
You know... It's kinda like climbing a mountain.
I've made it to the peak, even before Yaeno and
Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
This journey has changed who I am, but now I
have to start the final part of this adventure—I
have to descend the mountain.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
And as the end draws closer... I know I'll grow
weaker and weaker.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She lets out a hollow laugh. It's like she's braced
herself for something.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: But even so!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hehe... What timing. Um...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Can I go first?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
...Thanks. Ehehe. Sorry, I need to get it together
again.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: A-ahem.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer. I don't want to give up yet. I don't want
to lose yet.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I want to keep running—to win more.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
My performance may drop in the future, but still...
I want to keep going forever!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Heh... Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Then our new motto can be, "Leave
behind footprints even if it's raining"!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I'm counting on you from here on out too!
